what: Extract Data from Survey Solutions' Metadata
title: Extract Data from Survey Solutions' Metadata
text: susometa package provides functions : Parse Survey Solutions’ questionnaire metadata JSON file rectangular data frame Extract questionnaire objects attributes (e.g., sections, rosters, questions, answer options, etc.)

title: Extract Data from Survey Solutions' Metadata
text: Since susometa yet available CRAN, can installed GitHub follows:

title: Find paradata files — find_categories
text: Return path(s) categories files found target path.

title: Find paradata files — find_categories
text: dir Character. Directory scan categories files file_pattern Character. Default value SuSo's default file name. recurse Boolean. Default value assumes dir parent diectory contains child directories contain categories.

title: Find paradata files — find_categories
text: Character vector paths categories file(s).

title: Get answer options — get_answer_options
text: Obtain answer options target variable set name-value pairs labelled numeric vector.

title: Get answer options — get_answer_options
text: json_path Character. Full path Survey Solutions questionnaire JSON file (e.g., ~/my_proj/path//document.json). categories_dir Character. Path Categories directory metadata /.xlsx files containing reusable categories can found. varname Variable name. Bare name variable whose answer options extract. to_exclude Numeric vector. Code answer options exclude.

title: Get answer options — get_answer_options
text: Named numeric vector. Values answer codes. Names answer labels.

title: Get metadata on attachments — get_attachments
text: Data frame following columns: object_type. Character. Simplified object type. Value: attachment. type. Character. Value: "Attachment". attachment_id. Character. GUID translation. attachment_name. Character. User-provided name attachment. Designer fields refer . attachment_content_id. Character. System-provided GUID files Attachments

what: Get mutli-select answers as variable labels — get_ms_answers_as_var_labels
title: Get mutli-select answers as variable labels — get_ms_answers_as_var_labels
text: exported, multi-select questions become set variables whose name combination variable name answer option value Designer. function extracts answer options convenient form either label variables data columns display tables, expected specification labelling form {variable} = {variable label}.

title: Get mutli-select answers as variable labels — get_ms_answers_as_var_labels
code: get_ms_answers_as_var_labels(   json_path,   categories_dir = NULL,   varname,   to_exclude = NULL )

title: Get mutli-select answers as variable labels — get_ms_answers_as_var_labels
text: json_path Character. Full path Survey Solutions questionnaire JSON file (e.g., ~/my_proj/path//document.json). categories_dir Character. Path Categories directory metadata /.xlsx files containing reusable categories can found. varname Variable name. Bare name variable whose answer options extract. to_exclude Numeric vector. Code answer options exclude.

title: Get mutli-select answers as variable labels — get_ms_answers_as_var_labels
text: Named character variable. Names column names form {variable}__{value}. Values answer options.

title: Get metadata for questions — get_questions
text: Get metadata questions

title: Get metadata for questions — get_questions
text: json_path Character. Full path Survey Solutions questionnaire JSON file (e.g., ~/my_proj/path//document.json). add_section_id Boolean. Whether include public key section contains question.

title: Get metadata for questions — get_questions
text: Data frame following columns: section_id. Character. GUID. Present add_section_id = TRUE. object_type. Character. Simplified object type. Value: question. type. Character. SuSo-provided object type. Value: question type. question_type condition_expression hide_if_disabled featured instructions public_key question_scope question_text stata_export_caption variable_label is_timestamp varname hide_instructions use_formatting_properites geometry_type geometry_input_mode is_critical mask answer_text_* answer_value_* validation_expression_* validation_message_* validation_severity_* show_as_list categories_id is_filtered_combo_box show_as_list_threshold cascade_from_question_id max_answer_count linked_to_question_id

what: Parse all categories files into a single data frame — parse_categories
title: Parse all categories files into a single data frame — parse_categories
text: Parse categories files single data frame

title: Parse all categories files into a single data frame — parse_categories
code: parse_categories(   dir,   file_pattern = "\\.xlsx",   recurse = TRUE,   sheet = "Categories" )

title: Parse all categories files into a single data frame — parse_categories
text: dir Character. Directory category files located. file_pattern Character. Default value SuSo's default file name. recurse Boolean. Default value assumes dir parent diectory contains child directories contain categories. sheet Character. Name Excel sheet categories data stored. default, Survey Solutions' storage: "Categories".

title: Parse all categories files into a single data frame — parse_categories
text: Data frame following columns: category_id. GUID used questionnaire JSON reference reusable category. value. Numerical value input Designer (e.g., 1, 2). text. Character label input Designer (e.g., "Yes", "") parentid. GUID used identify parent question. Note: group category_id value represents contents single reusable category file.

title: Parse a categories file — parse_categories_file
text: Survey Solutions stores reusable categories Excel files. function parses file returns data frame.

title: Parse a categories file — parse_categories_file
text: path Character. Path categories file. sheet Character. Name Excel sheet categories data stored. default, Survey Solutions' storage: "Categories".

title: Parse a categories file — parse_categories_file
text: Data frame following columns: categories_id. GUID used questionnaire JSON reference reusable category. value. Numerical value input Designer (e.g., 1, 2). text. Character label input Designer (e.g., "Yes", "") parentid. GUID used identify parent question.

what: Parses JSON questionnaire file into rectangular data frame — parse_questionnaire
title: Parses JSON questionnaire file into rectangular data frame — parse_questionnaire
text: Transforms information found JSON questionnaire file, document.json, simpler rectangular file. JSON file provides (deeply) nested representation questionnaire. function returns rectangular data frame following format:

title: Parses JSON questionnaire file into rectangular data frame — parse_questionnaire
Parses JSON questionnaire file into rectangular data frame — parse_questionnaire
text: json_path Complete file path questionnaire JSON file, typically named document.json

title: Parses JSON questionnaire file into rectangular data frame — parse_questionnaire
text: Data frame contains attributes objects questionnaire.

title: Parses JSON questionnaire file into rectangular data frame — parse_questionnaire
text: Rows: objects questionnaire (e.g., sections, sub-sections, rosters, questions, variables, static text, etc.) Columns: attributes. format facilitates common needs : Collecting validations Compiling keys values questions (e.g., PublicKey questions understand paradata AnswerRemove event)

title: Reshape categories data — reshape_categories
text: Reshape categories data joined metadata category_id.

title: Reshape categories data — reshape_categories
text: categories_df Data frame. categories data frame produced parse_categories() parse_categories_file().

title: Reshape categories data — reshape_categories
text: Data frame columns: category_id. Category ID joining questionnaire metadata. answer_value_*. Value answer option. answer_text_*. Text label answer option.

title: susometa 0.4.1
text: Ensure survey object extraction functions always return core columns. Previously, functions extracted data JSON keys present JSON fil. Now, functions create column even keys present. single-select questions: show_as_list_threshold cascade_from_question_id list questions, max_answer_count

title: susometa 0.4.0
text: Workflow changes. previous versions, workflow two-step: first, parse questionnaire JSON file data frame; , extract target content questionnaire data frame. Now, workflow single step: extract target content JSON. API changes. line workflow changes, argument qnr_df, questionnaire data frame, now changed json_path, path questionnaire JSON.

title: susometa 0.4.0
text: Use faster engine parse JSON. particular, move tidyjson jqr, wrapper around jq, library filtering mutating JSON data. Static texts: get_static_texts() Macros: get_macros() Categories: get_categories() Translations: get_translations() Attachments: get_attachments() Lookup tables: get_lookup_tables() Critical rules: get_critical_rules() Questionnaire-level metadata: get_qnr_metadata()

title: susometa 0.3.2
text: Revert check varname parameter get_answer_options bare name, since working correctly called functions. Add variable type attributes exported Correct labels variable types (e.g., Boolean, string, etc.) Apply labels variable type

title: susometa 0.3.1
text: Export get_validations(), critical step somehow overlooked last release.

title: susometa 0.3.0
text: Add get_validations() return data frame validations objects associated. Add fixed roster titles questionnaire attributes extracted parse_questionnaire() Add fixed roster titles values return value get_rosters()

title: susometa 0.2.0
text: Draw answers questionnaire JSON reusable categories files. Check user inputs complete correct. Issue informative error messages . Add categories_id questions data Add roster_variable_name, condition_expression, hide_if_disabled rosters data Add testing infrastructure Add tests recently touched functions Add text fixtures Resilient Futures questionnaire current future testing. Add LSMS Team rights holder funder.

title: susometa 0.1.0
text: Split get_answer_options() two functions: get_answer_options() returns named numeric vector, values answer codes names value labels. get_ms_answers_as_var_labels() serves use case labelling multi-select variables exported data display tables.

title: susometa 0.0.0.9000
text: Initial version. Preserved lock old functionality get_answer_options() reproducibility.
